name: 2016 US Election Interference / DNC Hack

victim.description: Democratic National Committee, DCCC, and Clinton campaign chairman John Podesta

infrastructure.description: Spearphishing via bit.ly links, X-Agent implants on DNC servers, DCLeaks and WikiLeaks for document release

description: GRU Unit 26165 breached DNC and DCCC networks using spearphishing, deployed X-Agent for exfiltration, then released documents via DCLeaks and WikiLeaks to influence the 2016 presidential election.
